build.beforeBuildCommand: mkdir -p dist && cp -r src/languages dist/ && cp src/index.html src/app.js src/styles.css src/icon.svg src/favicon.ico dist/

security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: https:; media-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com
